# v0.5 launch tracking

Spec: `lex-drive/documents/wagtail-mcp-server-v0.5-spec.md` (internal).

v0.5 is the final-for-launch cut. Feature work ends at tag; post-cut fixes go to `v0.5.x` patch tags.

## Transport and distribution

- [ ] Standalone CLI entrypoint (`wagtail-mcp-serve`) wired via `pyproject.toml` `entry_points`
- [ ] MkDocs site scaffolded
- [ ] MkDocs GitHub Pages deploy action
- [ ] README Roadmap updated to reflect v0.5 final

## Toolsets

- [ ] `CollectionsQueryToolset` (on by default)
- [ ] `SnippetsQueryToolset` (on by default, read-only)
- [ ] `RedirectsToolset` (read on by default, write off)
- [ ] `seo.sitemap.regenerate` under `seo_write`
- [ ] `pages.preview` under `pages_query`
- [ ] `media.images.focal_point` under `media`

## Safety and hygiene

- [ ] `mcp_prune_audit` management command (with `--dry-run`, `--batch-size`)
- [ ] OTel emission default flipped to `True`
- [ ] Wagtail 7.4 LTS floor (gated on 2026-05-04 release)

## Tests

- [ ] `CollectionsQueryToolset` unit tests
- [ ] `SnippetsQueryToolset` unit tests
- [ ] `RedirectsToolset` unit tests
- [ ] `seo.sitemap.regenerate` unit tests
- [ ] `pages.preview` unit tests
- [ ] `media.images.focal_point` unit tests
- [ ] `mcp_prune_audit` unit tests
- [ ] HTTP: seeded-token `tools/list` round-trip
- [ ] HTTP: seeded-token happy-path `pages.update` round-trip
- [ ] HTTP: impersonation (`ALLOW_IMPERSONATION=True`) round-trip
- [ ] HTTP: toolset-toggle `tools/list` surface change
- [ ] CLI stdio subprocess smoke test

## Release conditions

- [ ] All v0.5 IN items merged
- [ ] Full pytest suite green (~190 tests target)
- [ ] HTTP endpoint tests green (8 total)
- [ ] MkDocs site deploys from a release-candidate branch
- [ ] v0.5-rc1 pinned and smoke-tested in lex-platform staging
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry drafted
- [ ] lex-platform Dockerfile pin bump to `@v0.5.0` (separate PR in lex-platform)

## Post-tag

- [ ] Tag `v0.5.0` on `main`
- [ ] Deploy lex-platform to prod on v0.5
- [ ] Internal announcement only (no public comms, no blog)
- [ ] 8-week dogfooding clock starts on prod deploy date
